title: Grave Robber
lyrics: Hey yo, I feel like I'm talking to you, cause the Lord said, hey, cause we do the same things at night. I dream with your man, and then I hug with your man, and then I look at you like you're a liability, my friend. Hey, I do the same thing that you do at night, yeah, I do the same thing that you do, and fight yourself in the moment, just say it's yours, am I done with this? Or are we done with it all, like coast to coast to coast, or just a coast to coast? Cause I like you gave it the most, it's not like you're the one with the roast, ayy. Now I know that's hard for you to see, the dangers that you invoke with your hand, but in an empty open bed, I mean a meaner me, and scenery of just degrees. Are we left right, 90 up right now, I can't think I'll live that long, to even say I'll be gone, I can't say that I'll live that long to write a song, but you understand it comes a little bit here, when we come back to the place that we held dear. I ain't got no hate, I ain't got no situation, you ain't on me, what you waiting on, that's for you, cause I do the same thing at night, I know I do the same thing, you all got people on my phone sitting there going, ayy, baby, ayy, I ain't texting, no I just swear it's a good homework, I just swear, I swear, I swear, I don't have, the thing you know that you have, cause you're fucking human, ayy, it'd be real bad. Just be honest and have communication, have your whole moment, be a springboard for the new centuries, the new involved in us, would you see that, no more secrets inside, when we lock the door tight at night, we're honest with ourselves and everybody around, cause that's the only way the stereo sound gets down, I know it's down, are you down, I'm seeing you, all degrees, yeah, me and you, it's social network, you're the vine, the diner, I'm the hardest, told you once man, you're just something, I got, I got, I wish it wasn't what I do, cause I loved you, but now I just see that stupid formula of you not wanting the real, think you know it all now, don't ya, think you know it all now, don't ya, with the doncha, with the guncha, with the gunfire, going back to the hood, you said that you're sour every day sitting here, you must love the whole entire, tear drop of booklets of you, and oh my god, you've been such a fucking victim, you, bye bye hood, yeah, we gonna dip and step and step, bye bye hood, you've been nothing but perfect, right, you're fucking perfect, right. you
